name: AXIM BIOTECHNOLOGIES, INC.
business: Axim Biotechnologies, Inc. develops and commercializes diagnostic healthcare solutions, focusing on point-of-care tests for eye diseases such as Dry Eye Disease (DED) and allergic conjunctivitis, using FDA-cleared lateral flow assays. The company sells its diagnostic tests and readers primarily to ophthalmologists and optometrists in the United States through an exclusive global commercialization partner, Versea Ophthalmics.
sellsTo: Eye care clinics in the United States

exposures.sentence: Through the development of diagnostic solutions that quickly and accurately diagnose various diseases, our products allow healthcare workers to quickly test and treat at the point-of-care, which leads to improved patient outcomes and provides numerous economic benefits to the healthcare system.

Our current products fall into these categories: (1) Eye Health, wherein we acquired two FDA cleared 510(k) tests for dye eye disease and have internally developed a third assay; and (2) SARS-CoV-2 neutralizing antibody tests.
On May 10, 2022, we announced the development of a novel tear sample collector system and the filing of a provisional patent application for it with the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office.

On September 12, 2023 AXIM announced that it has successfully developed the world s first rapid, point-of-care, non-invasive diagnostic assay for the detection of abnormal alpha-synuclein, a known biomarker for Parkinson s Disease using tears.
The invention relates to the discovery by AXIM scientists of a unique biomarker for cancer, QSOX1-L.

catalysts.event: Commence CLIA waiver comparative clinical study
catalysts.sentence: We plan to file for the waiver in the second quarter of 2024 after conducting a fairly simple comparative clinical study.
The expected timeline for filing and receiving a final CLIA decision is approximately three to six months.
We intend to run a clinical study for MMP-9 in the 3rd quarter of 2024.
The MMP-9 test is anticipated to follow in 2 nd quarter 2024 upon FDA clearance.

tamClaims.claim: 16 million Americans diagnosed with DED; actual number likely higher.
tamClaims.sentence: An estimated 16 million Americans have been diagnosed with DED, but the actual number of Americans suffering from dry eye symptoms is likely much higher.

tamClaims.claim: Nearly half of all U.S. adults experience dry eye signs and symptoms; 33% of eye care clinic patients have dry eye complaints.
tamClaims.sentence: Some reports indicate that nearly half of all U.S. adults experience dry eye signs and symptoms, and 33% of patients in eye care clinics present with complaints about dry eye.

tamClaims.claim: Total US market for eye care systems could approach 50,000 systems (USA Only).
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that total US market for our eye care systems could approach 50,000 systems (USA Only).

tamClaims.claim: Global DED market projected to reach $6.1 billion by 2024, growing at CAGR 6.6% from 2021 to 2026.
tamClaims.sentence: The DED marketplace is massive, with analysts projecting the global market to grow at a CAGR of 6.6% from 2021 to 2026 and reach $6.1 billion by 2024.

tamClaims.claim: DED affects approximately 350 million people worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: Despite DED being the most common ocular surface disorder, affecting approximately 350 million people worldwide causing persistent eye irritation, blurred vision, pain and decreased quality of life the sector has seen little innovation.
